'''âg-k-m''' ('''gakama''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tease|tease]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-k-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tease|tease]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-k-m
|-
! Lemma
| gakama
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gakamithi|gakamithi]] || [[word:gakamiji|gakamiji]] || [[word:gakamishi|gakamishi]] || [[word:gakami|gakami]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gakamuthuth|gakamuthuth]] || [[word:gakamujuj|gakamujuj]] || [[word:gakamushush|gakamushush]] || [[word:gakam|gakam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gakamuthu|gakamuthu]] || [[word:gakamuju|gakamuju]] || [[word:gakamushu|gakamushu]] || [[word:gakamu|gakamu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gakamufuth|gakamufuth]] || [[word:gakamufuj|gakamufuj]] || [[word:gakamufush|gakamufush]] || [[word:gakamuf|gakamuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gakamethe|gakamethe]] || [[word:gakameje|gakameje]] || [[word:gakameshe|gakameshe]] || [[word:gakame|gakame]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gakamothoth|gakamothoth]] || [[word:gakamojoj|gakamojoj]] || [[word:gakamoshosh|gakamoshosh]] || [[word:gakam|gakam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gakamotho|gakamotho]] || [[word:gakamojo|gakamojo]] || [[word:gakamosho|gakamosho]] || [[word:gakamo|gakamo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gakamofoth|gakamofoth]] || [[word:gakamofoj|gakamofoj]] || [[word:gakamofosh|gakamofosh]] || [[word:gakamof|gakamof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gakamĂŠthĂŠ|gakamĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:gakamĂŠjĂŠ|gakamĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:gakamĂŠshĂŠ|gakamĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:gakamĂŠ|gakamĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gakamathath|gakamathath]] || [[word:gakamajaj|gakamajaj]] || [[word:gakamashash|gakamashash]] || [[word:gakam|gakam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gakamatha|gakamatha]] || [[word:gakamaja|gakamaja]] || [[word:gakamasha|gakamasha]] || [[word:gakama|gakama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gakamafath|gakamafath]] || [[word:gakamafaj|gakamafaj]] || [[word:gakamafash|gakamafash]] || [[word:gakamaf|gakamaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:gakamasha|gakamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gogakamasha|gogakamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokigakamasha|gokigakamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:gakamnĂŒsha|gakamnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gogakamnknĂŒsha|gogakamnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokigakamnĂŒsha|gokigakamnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gakamshĂ«sha|gakamshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogakamnkshĂ«sha|gogakamnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigakamshĂ«sha|gokigakamshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gakamrosha|gakamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogakamnkrosha|gogakamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigakamrosha|gokigakamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gakamusha|gakamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gogakamnkmusha|gogakamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigakamusha|gokigakamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gakamsherasha|gakamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gogakamnksherasha|gogakamnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokigakamsherasha|gokigakamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:gakamngasha|gakamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gogakamnkngasha|gogakamnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokigakamngasha|gokigakamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gakamyasha|gakamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gogakamnkyasha|gogakamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokigakamyasha|gokigakamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gakamyamasha|gakamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gogakamnkyamasha|gogakamnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokigakamyamasha|gokigakamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gakamnĂŒshĂ«sha|gakamnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogakamnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gogakamnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigakamnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokigakamnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gakamnĂŒrosha|gakamnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogakamnknĂŒrosha|gogakamnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigakamnĂŒrosha|gokigakamnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gakamnĂŒmusha|gakamnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogakamnknĂŒmusha|gogakamnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigakamnĂŒmusha|gokigakamnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gakamshĂ«nĂŒsha|gakamshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogakamnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gogakamnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigakamshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokigakamshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gakamshĂ«rosha|gakamshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogakamnkshĂ«rosha|gogakamnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigakamshĂ«rosha|gokigakamshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gakamshĂ«musha|gakamshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogakamnkshĂ«musha|gogakamnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigakamshĂ«musha|gokigakamshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gakamronĂŒsha|gakamronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogakamnkronĂŒsha|gogakamnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigakamronĂŒsha|gokigakamronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gakamroshĂ«sha|gakamroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogakamnkroshĂ«sha|gogakamnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigakamroshĂ«sha|gokigakamroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gakamromusha|gakamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogakamnkromusha|gogakamnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigakamromusha|gokigakamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gakamunĂŒsha|gakamunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogakamnkmunĂŒsha|gogakamnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigakamunĂŒsha|gokigakamunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gakamushĂ«sha|gakamushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogakamnkmushĂ«sha|gogakamnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigakamushĂ«sha|gokigakamushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gakamurosha|gakamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogakamnkmurosha|gogakamnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigakamurosha|gokigakamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:gakam|gakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:gĂŠkĂŠm|gĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hogakam|hogakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hogĂŠkĂŠm|hogĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohogakam|hohogakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohogĂŠkĂŠm|hohogĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒgakam|nĂŒgakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒgĂŠkĂŠm|nĂŒgĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒgakam|nĂŒnĂŒgakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒgĂŠkĂŠm|nĂŒnĂŒgĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻgakam|nĂŻgakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻgĂŠkĂŠm|nĂŻgĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻgakam|nĂŻnĂŻgakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻgĂŠkĂŠm|nĂŻnĂŻgĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lugakam|lugakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lugĂŠkĂŠm|lugĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulugakam|lulugakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulugĂŠkĂŠm|lulugĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ligakam|ligakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ligĂŠkĂŠm|ligĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liligakam|liligakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liligĂŠkĂŠm|liligĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kogakam|kogakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kogĂŠkĂŠm|kogĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokogakam|kokogakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokogĂŠkĂŠm|kokogĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kegakam|kegakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kegĂŠkĂŠm|kegĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekegakam|kekegakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekegĂŠkĂŠm|kekegĂŠkĂŠm]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
